Try Tools
Simple Pricing

Plans for every need

Start free, upgrade when you need more. All plans include 100% client-side processing.

Free
$0 /forever

Perfect for occasional use and quick tasks.

  • 10 credits / day
  • 5 files per batch
  • 2 pipeline steps
  • 20MB file limit
  • All compressors & converters
  • Client-side processing
Get Started
Standard
$7 /month

For professionals who need more power.

  • 600 credits / month
  • 20 files per batch
  • 4 pipeline steps
  • 50MB file limit
  • Save pipeline presets
  • Priority support
Upgrade to Standard
Pro
$12 /month

Unlimited power for teams and agencies.

  • 1,800 credits / month
  • 100 files per batch
  • Unlimited pipeline steps
  • No file size limit
  • Unlimited pipeline presets
  • No daily run limit
Upgrade to Pro

Pricing FAQ

Yes! Cancel anytime. You'll retain access until the end of your billing period.
All major credit cards, PayPal, and Google Pay via Stripe.
Monthly credits do not roll over. Free daily credits reset every 24 hours.
The Free plan is a perpetual trial with 10 credits per day. No credit card required.
TidyFlow

Compress, convert, resize, rename, or batch files in one go. Runs in the browser — no data sent to any server.
